rows.label: qev050102_MSG0001
rows.name:
Well met! I have been waiting for you! Are
you the messenger sent by my master?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050102_JNK0010
rows.name: Shout Back

rows.label: qev050102_SEL0011
rows.name: Raise your voice just as loudly and confirm you are Go Belg's messenger.

rows.label: qev050102_JNK0020
rows.name: Answer Calmly

rows.label: qev050102_SEL0021
rows.name: Respond to his loud voice with a calm, even tone.

rows.label: qev050102_MSG0002
rows.name:
What a magnificent voice! And from such
a tiny human! You've got some guts![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050102_MSG0003
rows.name:
You're a far cry from a
spineless man like Gi Ziorde![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050102_MSG0004
rows.name:
This is going to be fun! Hurry,
hurry, hurry! Let us begin our duel![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050102_MSG0005
rows.name:
What is this?! Human! Your
voice is far too quiet![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050102_MSG0006
rows.name:
Are you some spineless coward
just like Gi Ziorde?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050102_MSG0007
rows.name:
But you are the messenger chosen
by my master... You must be
hiding some secret techniques![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050102_MSG0008
rows.name:
Ah! This is going to be fun,
so much fun! Hurry, hurry,
hurry! Let us begin our duel![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050102_MSG0009
rows.name:
I am Gi Ziordo, the greatest hero of the
Lars! Brave, resolute, and charging headlong
into battle! I fear absolutely nothing![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050102_MSG0010
rows.name:
I used to argue with Gi Ziorde constantly
over the proper way to fight battles![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050102_MSG0011
rows.name:
In this duel, I will prove once and for
all that my way is far superior to his![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050102_MSG0012
rows.name: Now, are you prepared?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050102_MSG0013
rows.name: Come at me, fair and square!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050102_MSG0014
rows.name:
I heard! They say you
defeated Gi Ziorde![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050102_MSG0015
rows.name: Well?! Was Ziorde a strong warrior?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050102_JNK0110
rows.name: Strong

rows.label: qev050102_SEL0111
rows.name: Admit you were overwhelmed by his agile swordplay.

rows.label: qev050102_JNK0120
rows.name: Weak

rows.label: qev050102_SEL0121
rows.name: Put on a confident face and say it wasn't much of a challenge.

rows.label: qev050102_MSG0016
rows.name:
Hah! If you were overwhelmed by a
spineless man like him, you must
not be much of a warrior yourself![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050102_MSG0017
rows.name:
I knew it, I knew it! A spineless man
like him has a low ceiling as a warrior![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050102_MSG0018
rows.name:
...But you see, things won't
go the same way with me![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050102_MSG0019
rows.name:
I am Gi Ziordo, the greatest hero of the
Lars! Brave, resolute, and charging headlong
into battle! I fear absolutely nothing![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050102_MSG0020
rows.name:
I used to argue with Gi Ziorde constantly
over the proper way to fight battles![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050102_MSG0022
rows.name: Now, are you prepared?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050102_MSG0023
rows.name: Come at me, fair and square!![ST:wait ]
